ddls:
CREATE TABLE "opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content associated with the opportunity */,
  "vol_requests" INTEGER /* Number of volunteer requests for the opportunity */,
  "event_time" INTEGER /* Event time associated with the opportunity */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the opportunity */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits or views for the opportunity */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or description of the opportunity */,
  "is_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the opportunity (e.g., None, High, Medium, Low) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the opportunity belongs to */,
  "category_desc" TEXT /* Description of the category the opportunity belongs to */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization managing the opportunity */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the opportunity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the opportunity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of opportunity (e.g., one-time, ongoing) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the opportunity (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content */,
  "content_text" TEXT /* Text or description of the content */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_title" TEXT /* Title or name of the organization */,
  "org_content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content associated with the organization */,
  "addresses_count" INTEGER /* Number of addresses associated with the organization */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality or city where the organization is based */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the organization is based */,
  "postalcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_desc" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer request */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity the request is for */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "volunteer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the volunteer (e.g., volunteer, organization manager, administrator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity the location is associated with */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "community_board" TEXT /* Community board associated with the location */,
  "community_council" TEXT /* Community council associated with the location */,
  "census_tract" TEXT /* Census tract associated with the location */,
  "bin" TEXT /* Building identification number (BIN) associated with the location */,
  "bbl" TEXT /* Borough block lot (BBL) associated with the location */,
  "nta" TEXT /* Neighborhood tabulation area (NTA) associated with the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity the event is associated with */,
  "event_time" INTEGER /* Event time associated with the event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event (in hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the attendance is for */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer attending the event */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date the volunteer attended the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the activity is for */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., event, volunteer request) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the community board */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_councils" (
  "council_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community council */,
  "council_name" TEXT /* Name of the community council */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community council */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("council_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_tracts" (
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census tract */,
  "tract_name" TEXT /* Name of the census tract */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the census tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bins" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BIN */,
  "bin_number" TEXT /* BIN number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the BIN */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bbls" (
  "bbl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BBL */,
  "bbl_number" TEXT /* BBL number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the BBL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bbl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ntas" (
  "nta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NTA */,
  "nta_name" TEXT /* Name of the NTA */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NTA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_roles" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id", "role_id")
)
